ol.li: Never close fd while n_in_flight > 0 → Use ASYNC_CANCEL first
Buffer ownership tracking → Buffer belongs to connection until send CQE
Connection ID != fd → Use conn_id for lookups to prevent reuse bugs
Check IORING_CQE_F_MORE for multishot → Resubmit accept when MORE=0
Handle short writes → Resubmit remaining bytes at adjusted offset

div.p: io_uring_prep_recv(sqe, fd, NULL, 0, 0) sqe->buf_group = BGID sqe->flags = IOSQE_BUFFER_SELECT user_data = (RECV << 60) | conn_id
io_uring_prep_send(sqe, fd, data, len, 0) user_data = (SEND << 60) | conn_id
